title: Atoz Funtime 55917 Rainmaker Activity Toy
features: Suitable for age 6 months and upwards
Turn the toy over to watch the colourful beads tumbling down
Press the button for squeaky sounds
description: Product Description This multi-coloured activity Rainmaker from fun time makes an ideal choice for your young toddler. It’s educational, sturdy and the fun and games never stop. Turn the toy over to watch the colourful beads tumbling down. Press the button for squeaky sounds. With mirrored end to explore reflection. We can’t promise that the fun time range of toys will make your child a genius, but they will certainly stimulate their senses. There’s only one word for the activity Rainmaker and that word is “fun”. this product conforms to EN71 and the toy safety Directive. PLEASE remove all packaging before giving it to your child. This toy is suitable for age six months and upwards. Box Contains 1 x Activity Rainmaker
